hero.h1: Discover Your True Radiance at Chroma Salon
hero.sub: Premium hair, skin, and nail services by certified beauty experts.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Chroma Salon
whyUs.sub: Dedicated to bringing out your inner beauty through expert care.

points.title: Certified Experts
points.desc: Our top beauty specialists hold prestigious international certifications.

points.title: Premium Products
points.desc: We use exclusively premium, high-performance, skin-friendly products.

points.title: Sterilized Environment
points.desc: Strict adherence to medical-grade sterilization for ultimate safety.

points.title: Free Consultation
points.desc: Receive tailored, professional beauty assessments with every visit.

services.title: Our Signature Services
services.sub: A curated range of high-end beauty treatments for ultimate luxury.

cards.title: Elite Hair Styling & Coloring
cards.desc: Custom cuts, multidimensional coloring, and deep restoration therapies.

cards.title: Premium Skincare & Facials
cards.desc: Revitalize your glow with medical-grade facials and clinical-level hydration.

cards.title: Bridal & Evening Makeup
cards.desc: Breathtaking bridal transformations and camera-ready glamor.

cards.title: Luxury Nail Art & Care
cards.desc: Flawless manicures, pedicures, and modern bespoke extensions.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.sub: Hear directly from our wonderful clients about their salon experience.

reviews.name: Eleanor Vance
reviews.text: The most relaxing and professional salon experience I've ever had. My hair feels absolutely incredible and soft!

reviews.name: Sophia Martinez
reviews.text: Perfect facials! My skin was glowing for weeks. The aesthetic here is so calming and luxurious.

reviews.name: Amira Yusuf
reviews.text: An amazing bridal makeup experience. The artists were so intuitive about what works best with my features.

booking.title: Instant Booking
booking.sub: Fill in your details below and our team will confirm your slot within minutes.
booking.successDesc: Thank you for choosing Chroma Salon! Our team will reach out via Phone/WhatsApp shortly to confirm your booking details.

footer.location: Luxury Beauty Blvd, Uptown District, 5th Floor
